Bash(sqlite3 /Users/emmanuelpolet/Documents/Pro/mdc/planning-astreintes-mdc-main/data/planning.db "SELECT date, type, label FROM slots WHERE period_id = ''2b1df557-ddce-4173-b5f7-7a6686acb1b5'' AND date IN \(''2026-12-25'', ''2027-01-01''\);")

Bash(sqlite3 data/planning.db "SELECT id, label, start_date, end_date, status FROM planning_periods ORDER BY start_date;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/planning.db "SELECT ps.period_id, pp.label, pp.start_date, pp.end_date, COUNT\(*\) as cadre_count, SUM\(ps.astreinte_d2+ps.astreinte_d3+ps.astreinte_d4+ps.astreinte_d5\) as total_diff_astr FROM period_scores ps JOIN planning_periods pp ON ps.period_id = pp.id GROUP BY ps.period_id;")
